name: Chartbeat Real-Time Content Analytics REST API
what_it_does: Chartbeat real-time content analytics REST API for digital publishers, media companies, and editorial teams to access live audience metrics, content performance data, attention time, traffic sources, social engagement, and story-level analytics — enabling automated editorial intelligence, content optimization, homepage personalization, audience retention insights, and subscription propensity analytics through Chartbeat's editorial analytics platform serving 60,000+ publishers across 60+ countries. Enables AI agents to manage real-time traffic for live audience concurrency and page view monitoring automation, handle content performance for article engagement and attention time analytics automation, access historical data for content trend and archive performance analysis automation, retrieve traffic sources for referral, social, and direct traffic breakdown automation, manage top content for trending story and viral content identification automation, handle subscriber analytics for subscription conversion and engagement automation, access attention metrics for engaged time and scroll depth analysis automation, retrieve social performance for Twitter, Facebook, and Google share tracking automation, manage section analytics for site section and category performance automation, and integrate Chartbeat with CMS (WordPress, Arc XP), analytics platforms, and editorial tools for audience intelligence automation.
use_cases: Monitoring real-time article traffic and audience for editorial team content decision automation agents
Analyzing content engagement and attention time for content optimization automation agents
Tracking traffic sources and referral performance for digital media analytics automation agents
Identifying trending stories and viral content for editorial homepage curation automation agents
not_for: E-commerce conversion analytics (Chartbeat is content/media analytics, not conversion funnel tracking)
Advertising performance (Chartbeat is editorial analytics, not ad server or programmatic platform)
Consumer app analytics (Chartbeat specializes in text/media content, not mobile app event analytics)
best_when: A digital publisher, media company, news organization, or editorial team wanting AI agents to monitor real-time audience metrics, analyze content engagement, track traffic sources, and identify trending stories through Chartbeat's publisher-specialized content analytics platform.
avoid_when: PUBLISHER ACCOUNT REQUIRED: Chartbeat requires media/publisher organization account; automated open analytics access assumption creates publisher_required; automated must be a qualifying digital publisher. TRACKING SCRIPT MUST BE INSTALLED: Chartbeat requires JavaScript tag on publisher pages; automated API-only analytics assumption creates no_data without Chartbeat tracking tag installed; automated must ensure Chartbeat tracking pixel is deployed on all pages. REAL-TIME API HAS HIGHER COST: Chartbeat live real-time data API has different pricing from historical API; automated uniform API assumption creates unexpected_cost for real-time monitoring vs. historical queries; automated must use correct API tier for real-time vs. historical data needs. DATA IS PUBLISHER-SCOPED: Chartbeat data is siloed per publisher account; automated cross-publisher aggregation assumption creates permission_denied for accessing other publishers' data; automated must access only own publisher account data.

auth.notes: Chartbeat uses API key for content analytics REST API. REST API with JSON. New York, NY HQ. Founded 2009 by Tony Haile. Products: Real-Time Dashboard, Historical API, Heads Up Display, Publishing, Subscribers. 60,000+ publishers. 60+ countries. Competes with Parse.ly, Comscore, and Google Analytics for editorial content analytics. Known for 'engaged time' metric innovation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Trial for qualified publishers; production requires Chartbeat subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by monthly unique visitor volume; Real-Time API and Historical API tiers; enterprise custom
pricing.notes: New York NY. Annual subscription. 60,000+ publishers. Engaged time analytics pioneer. Editorial focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; real-time and historical APIs throttled per subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: REAL-TIME VS HISTORICAL ARE SEPARATE APIS: Chartbeat has distinct real-time streaming and historical REST APIs with separate authentication and endpoints; automated unified API assumption creates endpoint_mismatch for cross-time-horizon queries; automated must implement both real-time and historical API clients

PAGE DATA IS ARTICLE-LEVEL: Chartbeat tracks at article/URL level; automated site-level assumption misses article-granular performance data; automated must query article-level metrics for content-specific optimization

CONCURRENT VISITORS IS REAL-TIME ONLY: Live concurrent visitor counts are only available via real-time API; automated historical concurrency assumption creates metric_not_in_historical for real-time-only metrics; automated must query real-time API for live audience counts

ENGAGED TIME IS CHARTBEAT-SPECIFIC: Chartbeat's 'engaged time' metric uses proprietary attention measurement; automated standard time-on-page assumption creates metric_confusion between Chartbeat engaged time and traditional session duration; automated must understand Chartbeat's attention measurement methodology

DOMAIN FILTERING IS REQUIRED: Chartbeat API responses include data for all tracked domains; automated single-domain assumption creates mixed domain data without explicit domain filtering; automated must filter API responses by specific domain for accurate site analytics
agent_readiness.security_notes: Content analytics. GDPR, CCPA. API key. US. Publisher audience and content performance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Media analytics. GDPR, CCPA. API key. US. Audience and content performance data.
